summary: Verified P3 Database Normalisation and Dedup Protection Badge features. All tests pass: normalise_db.py is idempotent (0 updates on second run), admin endpoint works, cleanup-duplicates endpoint returns stats, dedup test suite passes all 6 tests, frontend dedup badge displays correctly with green CheckCircle icon showing '6 unique grounds verified (12-topic classification)'.
critical_code_review_comments: normalise_db.py correctly handles 8 normalisation functions: cases, grounds, reports, documents, timeline_events, issue_classifications, sessions cleanup, and dedup
Script is idempotent - second run shows 0 updates across all collections
POST /api/admin/normalise-db endpoint requires admin auth (ADMIN_EMAILS env var)
Dedup badge in GroundsOfMerit.jsx uses data-testid='dedup-protection-badge' with green CheckCircle icon
Badge only shows when isUnlocked && grounds.length > 0
Startup dedup confirmed in backend logs: 'Startup dedup: no duplicates found across 39 cases'

success_rate.backend: 100% (health endpoint, normalise-db endpoint, cleanup-duplicates endpoint, dedup test suite all pass)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (landing page loads, login works, dashboard shows 3 cases, case detail shows dedup badge)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Database Normalisation and Dedup Badge features verified. normalise_db.py is idempotent (362 docs fixed on first run, 0 on subsequent runs). Admin endpoint at /api/admin/normalise-db works with admin auth. Dedup badge shows in GroundsOfMerit.jsx with green CheckCircle icon and text 'Dedup Protection Active — X unique grounds verified (12-topic classification)'. Case case_f8bf63e9dcbe (Homann v R) has 6 grounds with dedup badge visible.

verified_features.health_endpoint: PASS - returns healthy with database connected
verified_features.normalise_db_idempotent: PASS - second run shows 0 updates (all collections already normalised)
verified_features.admin_normalise_db_endpoint: PASS - returns detailed results with summary
verified_features.cleanup_duplicates_endpoint: PASS - returns grounds and issues stats
verified_features.startup_dedup_logs: PASS - confirmed 'Startup dedup' message in backend logs

verified_features.grounds_export_buttons: PASS - Print View, PDF View, Word View visible when unlocked
